examples: The letter was handwritten, in a hasty, barely decipherable scrawl.
The mark must be legible and indelible, and the characters easily decipherable.
The company either puts its name or decipherable initials on the back of store brands it fills.
It wants the current order paper, decipherable only by parliamentary aficionados, to be replaced by a more accessible agenda.
Adjacent to the pod is an interactive touch-screen timeline magnifying digitized exhibited documents, rendering even his nearly illegible script decipherable.
